productName: Phat Yeti Live Resin Lemon Cake - 1g
description: Aromatic sativa live resin pressed from fresh-frozen Lemon Cake, the sweet spot of flavor, potency, and that 'just-harvested' terpene rush. Saucy, vibrant, and intensely aromatic — with notes of lemon, cheese, and citrus, with a bright, heady lift.
